name: 牛顿三大定律
subject: physics
curriculum_points:
1.2.A.1
When using the object model, the size, shape, and internal configuration are ignored. The object may be treated as a single point with extensive properties such as mass and charge.

1.2.A.2
Displacement is the change in an object’s position.

1.2.B.1
Averages of velocity and acceleration are calculated considering the initial and final states of an object over an interval of time.

1.2.B.2
Average velocity is the displacement of an object divided by the interval of time in which that displacement occurs.

1.2.B.3
Average acceleration is the change in velocity divided by the interval of time in which that change in velocity occurs.

When using the object model, the size, shape, and internal configuration are ignored. The object may be treated as a single point with extensive properties such as mass and charge.

1.2.A.2
Displacement is the change in an object’s position.

Averages of velocity and acceleration are calculated considering the initial and final states of an object over an interval of time.

1.2.B.2
Average velocity is the displacement of an object divided by the interval of time in which that displacement occurs.

1.2.B.3
Average acceleration is the change in velocity divided by the interval of time in which that change in velocity occurs.

interactive_resources.code_hint: Matter.js 模拟碰撞：两物体碰撞观察动量守恒，可调质量/速度

GeoGebra 物理公式可视化：调节参数观察物理量关系

errors.description: 只记年代与名词，不能用史料与制度变迁解释历史进程。
把传说叙述与考古/文献证据混为一谈，未区分证据强度。

exercises.stem: 结合课标要求，说明「牛顿三大定律」的核心内涵，并各举一条史料或史实依据。
exercises.answer:
应答扣课标要点：1.2.A.1
When using the object model, the size, shape, and internal configuration are ignored. The object may be treated …；并区分证据类型（文献/考古/制度等）。

exercises.stem:
用因果链解释：1.2.A.2
Displacement is the change in an object’s position.… 对理解「牛顿三大定律」为何重要？
exercises.answer: 需写出前因—制度/经济/思想变化—后果，避免只罗列年代。
